newsSince: On June 2 Alchip announced expanded use of AWS for cloud-based silicon execution (design through tape-out) - an infrastructure/workflow item, not a new design win. The custom-AI-silicon thesis (3nm in production, 2nm ecosystem) remains intact. No new guidance or marquee win disclosed since June 9; +2.9% move is flow.

sources.label: AI Magazine - Alchip leverages AWS for cloud silicon execution (Jun 2)
HPCwire - Alchip to showcase advanced AI ASIC at TSMC 2026 symposium

verdicts.rankRationale: Node lens: 3nm-in-production / 2nm-ecosystem custom-ASIC thesis intact; Jun 2 AWS item is workflow, not a win. At only +20% YTD it is far less rerated/crowded than GUC, so residual alpha is modestly better. Hold rank, +1.
verdicts.bull: Leading-edge custom AI accelerators in volume; relatively un-rerated (+20% YTD) vs ASIC peers.
verdicts.neutral: AWS news incremental; awaiting next program disclosure.
verdicts.bear: Customer concentration; AI-project timing; ASIC theme crowded.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: custom-silicon/chiplets/SerDes/scale-up-fabric relevance reaffirmed by Jun 2 AWS tape-out partnership; optical attach indirect. Only +20% YTD leaves more residual alpha than GUC. Hold high rank, +1 on intact thesis.
verdicts.bull: Chiplet/SerDes/scale-up exposure to hyperscaler AI silicon; cleaner valuation than ASIC peers.
verdicts.bear: Customer concentration; AI project timing risk.
